/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MicroXRCEAgent.dir/microxrce_agent.cpp.o -o MicroXRCEAgent  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/eduardofelix/scout_bot_mac/MicroXRCEAgent_standalone/build -Wl,-rpath,/Users/eduardofelix/scout_bot_mac/MicroXRCEAgent_standalone/build/temp_install/fastcdr-2.2.0/lib libmicroxrcedds_agent.2.4.3.dylib temp_install/spdlog-1.9.2/lib/libspdlog.a temp_install/fastcdr-2.2.0/lib/libfastcdr.2.2.7.dylib
